title: Micronova
description:
You are small. The world is not. In Micronova, you venture into a microscopic ecosystem where every plant, every creature, and every structure is part of the challenge. In this world, everything reacts, everything surprises, and everything can be a puzzle. 

The art direction builds quantum scenarios never before imagined.

Vegetation that breathes, creatures with a life of their own, and environments that react to everything you do.

Physics and inertia matter, and every jump has consequences. When you learn to flow with the ecosystem, you're on your way to mastering the game.

Does that flower work as a springboard? Does this button activate something? By using the spheres spread across the map, the player can open up new paths and platforms.
description_short: In this vast universe, you are a Novi-01, a tiny explorer who jumps, climbs, and carves their way through levels filled with creatures and environments that react to your every move, waiting to be explored and solved in order to advance.
